channel.title: AI Workflows on AI Survival Blog - Investment Strategies for the AI Era
channel.description: Recent content in AI Workflows on AI Survival Blog - Investment Strategies for the AI Era

item.title: The AI Productivity Paradox: Why 95% of Companies See Zero ROI (And What the 5% Do Differently)
item.description: MIT found 95% of AI pilots fail. Klarna fired 700 people for AI, then rehired them. Here's why AI productivity is backfiring—and how to avoid being part of the 95%.

item.title: AI Coding Tools for Non-Developers: Which One Should You Actually Use?
item.description: Claude Code, Claude Cowork, Cursor, Windsurf, GitHub Copilot, OpenAI Codex — compared for non-developers who want to get real work done.

item.title: Claude Code for Non-Developers: Real Workflows That Actually Save Time
item.description: How product managers, analysts, and content creators use Claude Code without writing a single line of code. Plus: MCP explained in plain English.

item.title: 7 Notion AI Agent Use Cases That Actually Save Time (Real Examples)
item.description: From OKR tracking to IT ticket triage: how teams at Ramp, Remote, Vercel, and a proptech startup built Notion Custom Agents that work 24/7. Real metrics, real time saved.

item.title: Confident Ignorance: How LLMs Make You Feel Smart About Being Wrong
item.description: LLMs amplify your current state—they don't fix your blind spots. Learn how to avoid the trap of confident ignorance and build a verification framework that works.
